overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city during golden hour. The camera crosses multiple streets and walks along sidewalks filled with pedestrians, passing by neon-lit buildings, elevated highways, and various vehicles. The scene features high-quality game engine graphics with a warm, cinematic color grade typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view crossing a futuristic city street during golden hour. A beige vintage car passes in front of the camera while a distinctive purple muscle car is parked on the right. The camera moves toward the sidewalk with a large industrial building and elevated highway visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera steps into a wide crosswalk, transitioning from sidewalk to street. A tall cyberpunk tower dominates the center view, backlit by the golden hour sun. A woman with red hair walks across the frame while vehicles pass in the background. Red neon structures become visible on the left side of the intersection.

segments.scene_description: Moving through the intersection, the camera captures a complex multi-level highway structure on the left. A blue sports car speeds past in front of the camera. Smoke rises from the top of the distant tower visible earlier. The scene emphasizes the layered, vertical architecture of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet city street into the heart of a dense, vertically layered cyberpunk intersection during the golden hour. It begins by crossing a road past a vintage beige car and a parked purple muscle car, moving toward a sidewalk flanked by a large industrial building and a distant elevated highway. As the camera transitions onto the concrete path, it weaves through pedestrians, passing a palm tree and a woman with spiky blonde hair before gliding past a green neon storefront and a woman in white with red boots. The scene then opens up as the camera steps into a wide crosswalk, where a towering skyscraper is backlit by the sun and red neon structures emerge on the left. Finally, the movement carries the viewer through the intersection past a speeding blue sports car, revealing a complex multi-level highway system and smoke rising from the distant tower.
